name: Special Company Casserole-Frugal Method
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel potatoes and shred them in a blender or cuisinart grater to resemble hash browns. Rinse with cold water. Keep covered with cold water until ready to use.
2. Cook celery and onion in a small amount of water until tender.
3. In a separate container, mix 2 cups of cold water with the white sauce mix.
4. Cook on medium heat until the white sauce thickens. Add chicken broth base soup to the white sauce mix until fully dissolved.
5. In a large mixing bowl, combine drained potatoes, cooked onions and celery, white sauce mix, sour cream, and 1 cup grated cheddar cheese.
6. Transfer mixture into a greased 9x13 pan. Sprinkle remaining 1 cup grated cheddar cheese on top of the casserole.
7. Bake covered at 375°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
